subject: Windows asyncio Proactor transport noise
fact: The backend installs a Windows-only asyncio exception filter during FastAPI lifespan startup to suppress the benign Proactor `_call_connection_lost` `ConnectionResetError` with WinError 10054 that can occur while the Copilot SDK stdio transport is closing.
reason: This prevents future debugging sessions from treating a noisy Windows transport shutdown callback as a real provider or model-discovery failure.
